target: Chapter 20: Temple of Demons
It's quiet...
Yes, it's been quiet for a while now.
Can we really hide the handprint's signal by staying inside Gil like this?
It seems fine for now, but we're doing this with no rehearsal. ...What do you think, Ryunosuke-san?
We couldn't verify it, after all... If the signal disappears, Haine will notice, and if we do it too early, it gives them time to think...
Nothing has happened so far, so I think Shinpei-san's decision to "enter two hours prior" was correct.
Even if we managed to hide it, what if Gil himself is found?
Shinpei-san said that Gil's presence is the same as other strays, so it shouldn't be discovered here where it's not unnatural for strays to be.
"If we're found, we'll just wing it"... I can't tell if he's cautious or bold.
Ryunosuke-san?
...He's here!
Shinpei... you're back!?
Really, Shinpei!? What happened!? Where's Ushio!!?
Ushio…!!
Everyone... I'm back!!
Welcome back...!!
Karikiri Masahito
So this is why...! He hid the handprint's position...!!
…We must hurry to Hiruko Cave.
Karikiri-san!
K-Koyuba-san? Is something the matter?
Um... regarding the live performance, there's something I'd like to consult with you about.
...Meaning?
While I was talking with the Chamber of Commerce, they asked if we could include Hitogashima's history in the Hitogashima PR talk...
Eh? I haven't heard anything about that.
More fans came than we expected, so while we were discussing if there was anything we could do, it went in that direction.
And they said it would be best to ask you about the history, Karikiri-san. Could I have a little bit of your time...?
Ah... If that's the case--
Ah, wait a minute!? Owowowowowow!
Eh!? What's wrong!?
Ouch ouch ouch!! Koyuba-san, my stomach hurts so much!!
A-Are you okay? ...Ah, I have stomach medicine! I'll go get it right away, so wait here--
Impossible, impossible, impossible, I'm gonna go hole up in the bathroom for a bit!! I'll hear about the event later!
W-Wait!
Koyuba-san.
A-Ajiro-kun... I wonder if Karikiri-san is okay...?
No need to worry. I'll ask him instead, so for now, you just focus on the live performance.
U-Understood...
...Phew.
I wanted to stall him a little longer, but... ...Any more than this would be dangerous...
Ajiro-kun's shadow... He looks exactly like him, but has terrifying eyes that don't resemble his at all...
Even though we only talked for a little bit, my hands won't stop shaking...
This is about all I can do, but...
Ajiro-kun, do your best.
Shinpei Ajiro
I wonder if they found out? About our plan.
Yeah, it'd be a problem if they didn't.
With this, their top priority will definitely be us. They shouldn't be able to start the massacre above until they kill us.
Ow!
Gil detected a shadow's presence... 2 o'clock direction... 20 meters ahead!!
It's coming this way...! We've been found out after all!
Ow, I was hit by something!
Something like a needle--it shot its teeth at me!? This guy is aiming for a shadow pin...!!
Tokiko, are you okay!?
(Operating Gil from the inside like this allows for complex commands, but on the other hand, damage to Gil is transmitted to the operator, Toki-chan...)
(Damn it! It's pitch black inside Gil, and I can't tell what's going on outside! Should I go out and fight back?)
Toki-chan! I'll go out and fight!!
I'm fine! I'll hold them off!!
Now! Everyone, go on ahead!! I'll be fine here by myself!!
Hah!? Like hell we can leave you behind!!
I'm telling you to hurry up and go!!! Is this the time to be dawdling around!!?
...Understood... thank you...!!
No, I'm the one who should be thanking you.
Thank you very much, Shinpei-san. For forgiving someone like me.
Tokiko... don't die...!!
You're the one who shouldn't be dragging everyone down, Onii-chan!
A dead... end!?
No...!! I'm pretty sure Hiruko's sleeping quarters are past here!?
Yeah... there's a pitch-black wall.
It's not just a black wall. I can't sense any presence inside at all... It's a wall of mud...!!
Hah!
(Shide's presence!! He's almost here!!)
Shinpei!!
Yeah... From the sea... and the shrine grounds... They're coming at incredible speed...!!
Move! I'll blow a huge hole in this wall!
Ooh!? Blood is coming out of the wall!!
No, it's no good...!
It's regenerating...
I'll try! If I hack it--ow!
Ushio! Are you okay!?
That was close... I got hacked back instead...!! This wall is... a 3D manifestation of Hiruko herself!
Damn it!! Even though Hiruko is right on the other side of this wall!!
(I guess they wouldn't let us pass so easily...)
(We don't have time! It's our trump card for defeating Hiruko, but this is no time to be holding back!!)
Everyone... let's do this. We'll blow the wall away with a bomb!
Wh-!? Where do you have something like that!!
Right here.
Before coming here, I had Mio steal this!
Ooh...! This is a skyrocket firework!! You were hiding something like this!
I'm going to light it, so hide behind the rock!
Did we do it!?
(Ugh... this feeling! Like Ushio said before, like scratching a chalkboard...!)
(I feel Hiruko's presence...!! No doubt about it. We've broken through...!!)
Let's go, before the hole closes.
Ugh... It has a weird elasticity, it feels gross...
...It smells like gunpowder... and steak.
Stop it, I won't be able to eat steak anymore!!
It also smells a bit like raspberries and rum...
It's nothing that nice!!!
(...Shide is coming!!)
Get down! Nezu-san!!
Eat this!!
The hole is closing!!
Nezu-san, hurry!!!
Hey... wait a second...!
Handguns are no good, but... this seems to work...!
Don't mind me!! Keep going!!!
Nezu-san!!
Go! Before the hole completely closes!!!
You wanna die!? Old man!!
When you're lost... think about what your future self would do, and make a decision.
Then, you won't have any regrets.
(What... my future self would do...)
I leave this place to you...!!
Yeah... say hi to Ryunosuke for me.
Yes! ...Let's go, everyone!
Ginjiro Nezu
...You're a disgrace... you know that...
Masahito... Or is it Iwao... is that you!?
...Who cares... which one it is... Gin-boy...
For the sake of our childhood friendship... move... I don't want to hear your screams...
...Don't underestimate me!
If you want to pass, you'll have to kill me first!!!
